hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|js|vue|jsx|tsx)$' && command -v eslint &>/dev/null && npx eslint --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true

echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qP 'git commit.*-m.*(feat|fix)[:(]' && echo '[PO] feat/fix commit detected. Consider running /po review to check if any in-progress item AC is now satisfied.' || true
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(\.env|package-lock\.json|pnpm-lock\.yaml|secrets?\.yaml)$' && echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit sensitive or lock file' && exit 2 || exit 0

echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(compliance-floor\.md|compliance/targets\.md)$' && { [ -f .claude/compliance/.applying ] && find .claude/compliance/.applying -mmin -1 -print -quit 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && exit 0 || echo 'BLOCKED: Compliance files are protected. Use /compliance propose to submit changes through the Compliance Officer.' && exit 2; } || exit 0
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'events.jsonl' && echo 'BLOCKED: Use ops/metrics-log.sh instead of writing events.jsonl directly' && exit 2 || exit 0

echo 'Key context: Agent fleet harness with 7 governance agents (CO, CISO, CEO, CTO, CFO, COO, CKO) and 6 operational agents (PO, SA, SM, knowledge-ops, platform-ops, compliance-auditor). Compliance floor guarded by CO with hook enforcement. Progressive autonomy (Crawl/Walk/Run/Fly). See CLAUDE.md for details.' > /tmp/antfarm-compact-context.txt
echo '[PO] Agent completed. If this was a specialist build, consider /po review. If this was a reviewer, check findings register.' || true
echo '[PO] Session started. Run /po for a quick status overview: WIP state, next recommended item, and grooming needs.'

[ -f .claude/compliance/compiled/manifest.sha256 ] && [ -f compliance-floor.md ] && { EXPECTED=$(grep '^source:' .claude/compliance/compiled/manifest.sha256 | cut -d' ' -f2); ACTUAL=$(sha256sum compliance-floor.md | cut -d' ' -f1); [ "$EXPECTED" = "$ACTUAL" ] && echo '[CO] Compliance artifacts in sync.' || echo '[CO] WARNING: Compliance floor changed but artifacts not recompiled. Run ops/compile-floor.sh or /compliance apply.'; } || true

[ -f fleet-config.json ] && command -v jq &>/dev/null && { CADENCE=$(jq -r '.prioritize_cadence // "per-iteration"' fleet-config.json 2>/dev/null); [ "$CADENCE" = "per-session" ] && echo '[PO] Backlog triage is due. Run /po triage to review priorities.'; } || true

statusLine.command: PACE=$(grep -oP '(?<=Current Pace: \*\*)[^*]+' .claude/COLLABORATION.md 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); WT=''; git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree &>/dev/null && [ "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" != "$(git worktree list --porcelain 2>/dev/null | head -1 | sed 's/worktree //')" ] && WT=' [worktree]'; PROJECT=$(basename "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null || basename "$PWD"); CWD=$(pwd); echo "$PROJECT:$BRANCH$WT | $CWD | Pace: $PACE"
